title: Erai (disambiguation)
content:
'''Erai''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Erai system/Legends|Erai system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Hangshan sector/Legends|Hangshan sector]]
*The '''[[third moon of Erai]]''', a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] located in the Erai system

{{Disambig}}
